commands.review_summary:
The PR moves Canvas runtime ownership into a bundled experimental Canvas plugin, removes vendored A2UI/generated surfaces, and adds generic plugin HTTP, WebSocket, media, CLI, hosted-surface, and node-capability seams.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: latest-head source inspection shows the hard-coded plugin upgrade auth flag, blocked-upgrade fallthrough, surface-only capability lookup, missing core method reservation, media resolver exception propagation, and bind-host URL override. I did not establish a live Canvas/A2UI or native paired-node reproduction path.
